race.description: Ladbrokes Racing Extras In Multi Hcp (C6)
race.comment: DAGGERS (4) has started favourite at all five runs since landing in Tony Gollan's yard but has only saluted once. Raced handy as usual and battled on okay for third last start over 1350m at Ipswich. Goes to the mile in preference to a 1350m earlier on the card. Trust the stable has jumped the right way. HIGH DANDY (8) has returned in fine fettle for the Munce camp. Handy all the way and looked the winner only to be edged out over this trip at Eagle Farm last time. Steps up to Saturday company but drops 2.5kgs and should be peaking. SOSINO (5) won two on the trot before clocking in just behind HIGH DANDY when they clashed at the Farm recently. Needs a bit of luck from the awkward gate but he looks one of the better hopes on current form. POCKETMONEY (12) has hit form with a couple of nice efforts over 1400m of late. Getting through the line as though he needs the mile now. ECLAIR AWESOME (10) needed the run last time when fresh from a seven-week let-up. Good miler with strong claims.
